name: typst.ts
when_to_use: 需要在浏览器把 AI 熟悉的 Typst 源码编译成专业多页 SVG 预览或 PDF 时用它而非手写排版，因为原生在断行、分页、数学排版和字体度量上失败；非做富文本编辑器或普通网页布局。
why_valuable: AI 默认能写 Typst 源码但完全做不到浏览器内的 Typst 编译、字体解析、分页和矢量输出；WASM 引擎把高质量排版从易漂的 HTML/CSS 提升为确定性编译。

data_in._why_no_example: Typst 是 AI 原生记法，schema 与原生 $typst.svg 调用足矣，不附 minimal example。

schema.mainContent: string —— 完整或片段式 Typst 源码，原样传给 $typst.svg({mainContent})
schema.inputs?: Record<string,string> —— 供 Typst sys.inputs 读取，默认 {}

spec.note: 多页 SVG 预览容器需显式 height 并自行滚动；默认 640px，AI 可覆盖，铁律 3 禁 vh/百分比高。页面纸张尺寸由 Typst 源码决定。

boot.codex:
// sandbox iframe:同 artifact；@0/+esm 会继续加载 compiler/renderer peers 与 WASM。
// 若只需文件，改用 await $typst.pdf({mainContent:data.mainContent,inputs:data.inputs ?? {}}) 得 Uint8Array。

carriers.artifact: inferred-not-tested:WASM H0 探针尚未闭合
carriers.widget: conditional:需允许 wasm、@myriaddreamin/typst-ts-web-compiler 与 typst-ts-renderer 的 ESM 依赖；加载字体时还需 font-cdn
carriers.codex: conditional:需 wasm + 多包 ESM；默认纯源码可编译，外部字体/Typst package 另受网络策略约束

isolation.evidence: Main +esm: 0 `document.head` and 0 createElement(style/link) -> no global CSS injection; output of $typst.svg() is an SVG STRING the consumer mounts (boot: DOMParser+importNode into shadowRoot), so the mount target stays clean. globalDomMutation=unknown: 2 `document.body` refs in main bundle (likely offscreen font-metric measurement); WASM peer packages (typst-ts-web-compiler/renderer) not scanned. globalEvents=unknown: 1 addEventListener in main bundle (low), peers not scanned. shadowCompatible=conditional: SVG-string output mounts fine in shadow, but compiler is WASM requiring CSP wasm support + ESM peer deps (matches entry 'conditional: 需允许 wasm').

minimal.mainContent:
#set page(width: 16cm, height: auto, margin: 1.4cm)
#set text(size: 12pt)
#set par(justify: true)

= Typesetting with Typst

Compiled to *SVG* in the browser by `typst.ts` --- real line breaking,
kerning, and math layout, not an HTML/CSS approximation.

The roots of $a x^2 + b x + c = 0$ are given by

$ x = (-b plus.minus sqrt(b^2 - 4 a c)) / (2 a) . $

#lorem(24)

en.when_to_use: Use it to compile AI-friendly Typst source in the browser into a professional multi-page SVG preview or PDF instead of implementing layout by hand, which fails at line breaking, pagination, mathematical typesetting, and font metrics. Not for a rich-text editor or ordinary web layout.
en.why_valuable: AI can write Typst source by default but cannot perform in-browser Typst compilation, font parsing, pagination, or vector output; the WASM engine upgrades high-quality layout from drift-prone HTML/CSS to deterministic compilation.

schema.mainContent: string -- Complete or fragmentary Typst source, passed unchanged to $typst.svg({mainContent})
schema.inputs?: Record<string,string> -- Read through Typst sys.inputs; default {}

spec.note: The multi-page SVG preview container needs an explicit height and its own scrolling; default 640px. AI may override it, but vh and percentage heights are forbidden by rule 3. Typst source determines the page paper size.
